title: Configurable MC-237017 Fix
description: Fixes MC-237017 to allow for configurable lava-fill at the bottom of the world
body:
# Configurable MC-237017 FIX
Based on a mod by Andrew6rant, found here: [https://modrinth.com/mod/mc-237017-fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/mc-237017-fix)

## Changes
I added a configuration for the user to select where they want lava to generate at. I use worlds that go to `y= -128`, so I set it to `-96`.
